metcon.name: Kings Birthday Partner Workout
metcon.description:
Teams of 3
For time - 45 min time cap
300m Run together
60/45 cal Row / Ski / Bike
Partition as required - 1 athlete working
300m Run together
60 Hang Power Snatches @ 50/35kg
Partition as required - 1 athlete working
300m Run together
60 Pull ups / 30 bar muscle ups
Partition as required - 1 athlete working
300m Run together
500m Farmer Carry @ 32/24kg per hand
2 athletes working / 1 running (partition as required)
300m Run together
60 Wall Balls @ 9/6kg
Partition as required - 1 athlete working
300m Run together
45 Synchro DB Snatches @ 22.5/15kg
2 athletes working / 1 resting
Reps count when both DBs are locked out overhead together

hypertrophy.reasoning: Snatch and pull-ups dominate upper back/delts; rows tax lats; farmer carry/running load quads and grip.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Metcon: Kings Birthday Partner Workout. For Time, 45 min cap: 300m Run together, 60/45 cal Row / Ski / Bike, 300m Run together, 60 Hang Power Snatches @ 50/35kg, 300m Run together. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, hamstrings, rear delts.
